title: Fair-DanTiao
body:
![Core Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core%20Support-Spigot-blue)
![Version Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version%20Support-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24%5B'Fair-DanTiao'%5D&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> Fair-DanTiao —— A companion plugin for DanTiao

### 2. Features

1. Removes title buffs, racial bonuses, and guild PVP checks when a match starts
2. Restores title buffs, racial bonuses, and guild PVP checks when a match ends

### 3. Prerequisites

DanTiao Plugin (Required)  
[Documentation](https://1392847363.gitbook.io/dantiao)  
PlayerTitle Plugin  
[Documentation](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerTitle/README/)  
PlayerRace Plugin (Requires 2.0.1+)      
[Documentation](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerRace/README/)  
PlayerGuild Plugin (Requires 2.0.0+)          
[Documentation](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerGuild/README/)

### 4. Documentation

[Click to View](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/Fair-DanTiao/)
